title: Zig KV-Cache memory management
description:
Implement pre-allocated KV-Cache in zig/src/ops/kvcache.zig.

- Pre-allocated contiguous buffers: K[max_seq, n_kv_heads, head_dim], V[max_seq, n_kv_heads, head_dim]. Allocated once.
- kvcache_create: allocate K/V buffers for one layer
- kvcache_append: copy new K/V for single token at position pos. O(1) memcpy.
- kvcache_slice: return view of K/V from 0..seq_len. Zero-copy pointer+length.
- kvcache_reset: reset position counter to 0 (no deallocation)
- Per-layer management of N independent caches

Tests (mandatory):
- test_kvcache.zig: Create cache, append tokens, verify slice returns correct K/V. Reset and reuse. Verify no re-allocation on append (tracking allocator).
- bench_kvcache.zig: Generate 256 tokens with KV-cache (incremental attention) vs without (full recompute). Measure wall time.

Pass/fail:
- Appended K/V correctly readable via slice
- Cached generation >= 3x faster than full recompute at seq_len=256
- No memory allocation after initial create
- Reset + reuse produces same results as fresh cache

Register in zig/build.zig.
